## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (or N/A — no tests touched)
- [ ] No secrets, PII, or `.env` files in the diff
- [ ] Updated `.env.example` if a new env var was added
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CLEANUP.md` if behavior changed
